ground_truth.title: Data Analytics Platforms Software Product Ranking Comparison
ground_truth.author: KLAS Research
ground_truth.main_content: This KLAS Research report provides a comprehensive ranking and comparison of healthcare Data Analytics Platforms software vendors. The comparison includes major vendors such as Arcadia, Clearsense, Dimensional Insight, Epic, Health Catalyst, Innovaccer, Oracle Health, Cogito (Epic Only), Data Platform, Data Platform as a Service, Diver Platform, Gravity, Health Catalyst Analytics Platform, and Oracle Population Health Analytics. The report evaluates these platforms across multiple dimensions including overall performance scores, products appearing in buying decisions, scores by question topic, provider facility size preferences, and provider facility type preferences. Healthcare organizations can use this data to make informed decisions about data analytics platform investments.
with: This KLAS Research report provides a comprehensive ranking and comparison of healthcare Data Analytics Platforms software vendors.
The comparison includes major vendors such as Arcadia, Clearsense, Dimensional Insight, Epic, Health Catalyst, Innovaccer, and Oracle Health.
The report evaluates these platforms across multiple dimensions including overall performance scores.
Healthcare organizations can use this data to make informed decisions about data analytics platform investments.
Products are compared based on scores by question topic, provider facility size preferences, and provider facility type preferences.
